---
title: "Samuel Nitkin"
---

::: {.hero}
::: {.hero-photo}
![](files/nitkin_headshot_web.jpg){fig-alt="Samuel Nitkin headshot"}
:::

::: {.hero-text}
## PhD Student in Economics

I am a PhD student in Economics at **Boston University**. My research interests are in the Economics of Education, Labor Economics, and Public Economics, with a focus on understanding the impacts of educational inequality in America.

I hold a BA in Economics from the University of Chicago. Before beginning my PhD, I worked as a pre-doctoral fellow at [Opportunity Insights](https://opportunityinsights.org/){.plain-link} with professors Raj Chetty and John Friedman, where I studied the determinants and consequences of elite college admissions.

Contact: [snitkin@bu.edu](mailto:snitkin@bu.edu)

::: {.contact-icons}
<a class="email-icon" href="mailto:snitkin@bu.edu" aria-label="Email Samuel Nitkin" title="Email">
<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M3 5.5h18v13H3v-13Zm1.8 1.7v.2l7.2 5.1 7.2-5.1v-.2H4.8Zm14.4 9.6V9.5L12 14.6 4.8 9.5v7.3h14.4Z"/></svg>
</a>
<a class="linkedin-icon" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/samuel-n-b773b6156" aria-label="Samuel Nitkin on LinkedIn" title="LinkedIn">
<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M5.4 8.9h3.2v10.2H5.4V8.9Zm1.6-5c1 0 1.8.8 1.8 1.8S8 7.5 7 7.5s-1.8-.8-1.8-1.8S6 3.9 7 3.9Zm3.8 5h3v1.4h.1c.4-.8 1.5-1.7 3-1.7 3.2 0 3.8 2.1 3.8 4.9v5.6h-3.2v-5c0-1.2 0-2.8-1.7-2.8s-1.9 1.3-1.9 2.7v5.1h-3.2V8.9Z"/></svg>
</a>
:::
:::
:::
